concerns.text: FR-009 requires a sensitivity analysis sweeping the 'inconsistency tolerance threshold' over {0.01, 0.05, 0.1}. The plan's 'Phase Execution Order' and 'Technical Context' sections do not mention this sensitivity analysis, the specific thresholds, or the 'inconsistency tolerance threshold' metric. There is no task to implement or measure SC-005.

SC-005 (Sensitivity of reconstruction results) is unbacked. The plan details LOCO validation (Phase 2) and bootstrap resampling (Phase 3/4) but lacks any explicit phase, task, or output artifact dedicated to the sensitivity analysis of the inconsistency tolerance threshold required by FR-009 and SC-005.
